Fireflies.ai Review

AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes calls

Visit Fireflies.ai →
PricingFree / $10/mo Pro / $19/mo Business
Rating★★★★ 4.2/5
Best forremote teams, sales teams, managers

Pros & Cons

👍 Pros

  • Auto-joins meetings
  • Good transcription
  • Searchable history

👎 Cons

  • Free tier limited
  • Accuracy varies by speaker
  • Privacy concerns

Key Features

  • Auto-recording
  • Transcription
  • AI summaries
  • Action items

Best Use Cases

  • Meeting notes
  • Sales call analysis
  • Interview recording

Compare with Alternatives

See how Fireflies.ai stacks up against: TodoistToggl TrackClickUpCalendlyLark
